sourcePolicy.provenanceRepresentation: The user states that they personally created all four tracks with Suno.
sourcePolicy.termsFinding: Suno assigns its interest in output generated during a Pro or Premier paid subscription, while Basic/free output is limited to attributed personal non-commercial use. Later subscription is not retroactive by default.
sourcePolicy.accountEvidence: Read-only signed-in review on 2026-07-18 showed an active Pro plan, next billing date 2026-07-20, and matching track creation times on 2026-07-17 between 20:52 and 21:00 America/Chicago. The current Pro plan states commercial use rights for new songs made.
sourcePolicy.decisionBasis: The billing and creation timeline supports the inference that the paid subscription covered generation. This is a project provenance decision, not a warranty that copyright vests.
sourcePolicy.requiredDecision: None for Vanta City project use. Re-review if account evidence, authorship representation, or Suno terms are later shown to be inaccurate.

analysisMethod.metadata: macOS afinfo, stat, mdls, and SHA-256
analysisMethod.signal: read-only PCM analysis of peak, RMS, exact clipped samples, 100 ms silence windows below -50 dBFS, and first/last-frame discontinuity
analysisMethod.limitation: No reliable musical-style or subjective transition approval was possible from metadata and waveform statistics alone.

candidates.technicalDecision: valid and unclipped source; full-file hard looping requires an auditory seam review because it ends without a trailing silence window
valid and unclipped source; trailing silence favors sequential rotation over an unedited full-file loop
valid and unclipped source; two-second tail favors sequential rotation or an authored trim/crossfade rather than full-file looping
valid and unclipped source; largest boundary discontinuity and 1.6-second tail require an authored trim/crossfade and auditory review before looping
